name: Parallel Departmental Research
description: Spawn multiple research agents simultaneously to conduct comprehensive analysis before any execution
when_to_use: When starting a new project or major initiative that requires business planning
how_to_apply: 1. Define the research questions for each department
2. Spawn all research agents in a single message (parallel execution)
3. Each department works independently: Research, MBA, Marketing, Finance, Product, Legal
5. CEO Brain synthesizes findings and resolves conflicts
6. Present to user for approval before execution

evidence.result: Comprehensive research completed in single session

warnings: Ensure agents don't have dependencies between them when spawning in parallel
